props.heading: Privacy Policy
props.description: We treat personal information with the same care we bring to community service: responsibly, transparently, and with respect.

highlights.text: Clear purpose for every data category

props.heading: Privacy at a Glance
props.description: Our privacy standards are built for donor trust and participant safety.

features.title: No data sale
features.description: We do not sell personal information to third parties.

features.title: Purpose-limited use
features.description: Information is used only to operate programs, respond to requests, and improve service quality.

features.title: Minimal retention
features.description: We retain information only as long as necessary for legal, operational, and security needs.

features.title: Rights and control
features.description: You may request access, correction, deletion, or restriction where applicable by law.

props.heading: 1) Scope
props.body:
This Privacy Policy applies to Harmony Hope Foundation websites, forms, and related services used for donations, volunteering, support requests, and communications.

It does not govern third-party platforms linked from our website.

props.heading: 2) Information We Collect
props.body:
We may collect contact details (such as name and email), request details submitted through forms, donation-related details processed by secure payment providers, and basic technical usage data (such as browser type and approximate location from IP).

We collect only what is reasonably necessary to deliver and improve services.

props.heading: 3) How We Use Information
props.body:
We use information to respond to requests, coordinate volunteering, process support communications, share impact updates, maintain website security, and improve supporter experience.

Where feasible, we use aggregated or de-identified data for learning and reporting.

props.heading: 4) Information Sharing
props.body:
We may share information with trusted service providers (for hosting, analytics, communications, and secure payment processing) under contractual safeguards.

We may also disclose information when required by law or to protect safety, rights, and platform integrity.

props.heading: 5) Data Retention and Security
props.body:
We apply reasonable administrative and technical safeguards to protect information.

No internet-based system is fully risk-free, but we continuously improve our controls and retain data only as long as needed for legitimate purposes.

props.heading: 6) Your Rights
props.body:
Depending on applicable law, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or export your personal information.

To make a request, contact us through our Support Center and include enough detail for verification.

props.heading: 7) Children’s Privacy
props.body: Our services are not directed to children under 13. If we learn that personal data from a child was collected without proper consent, we will take reasonable steps to remove it.

props.heading: 8) Policy Updates
props.body: We may update this policy as our services evolve. Material updates will be reflected by publishing the revised version on this page.

props.heading: Questions about privacy?
props.description: Reach out through Support Center and our team will help with care and clarity.

props.copyright: © 2026 Harmony Hope Foundation. All rights reserved.
